untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) prior 100% price doubling within 2-year lookback period (requires historical price comparison not available in bar-level indicators), (2) consolidation/flag pattern shape recognition (requires pattern detection logic beyond simple indicator comparison), (3) brief downside spike identification (requires intra-pattern micro-structure analysis). These require pattern recognition or multi-bar historical analysis unavailable in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the continuation/breakout aspect using price above SMA_50 (strength) and volume confirmation for breakout. Exit when price crosses below SMA_20 (losing support). However, the core identification of this pattern depends on shape recognition and historical price doubling validation that cannot be expressed with point-in-time technical indicators alone. This rule serves as a breakout entry proxy only and does NOT truly identify the High, Tight Flag pattern as defined.
